ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the algorithm */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming language used to implement the algorithm */,
  "implementation_details" TEXT /* Implementation details, such as libraries or frameworks used */,
  "input_requirements" TEXT /* Input requirements for the algorithm */,
  "output_details" TEXT /* Output details, such as data formats or expected results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the author belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The author's current affiliation */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* The author's research interests or areas of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License or usage terms for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Evaluation metrics used to assess the algorithm's performance */,
  "reproducibility_details" TEXT /* Details on how to reproduce the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that generated the result */,
  "real_time" REAL /* Real time taken by the experiment */,
  "user_time" REAL /* User time taken by the experiment */,
  "sys_time" REAL /* System time taken by the experiment */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the result */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Actual value of the evaluation metric */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the metric value */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests or areas of expertise */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan or access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspaces" (
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workspace */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the workspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workspace */,
  "workspace_type" TEXT /* Type of workspace */,
  "access_controls" TEXT /* Access controls or permissions for the workspace */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of collaborators or contributors to the workspace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspaces_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version changes or updates */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed change log or release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version changes or updates */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed change log or release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the experiment */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration settings */,
  "config_rationale" TEXT /* Rationale or justification for the chosen configuration settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the post */,
  "related_posts" TEXT /* List of related or relevant posts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being rated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason or justification for the given rating */,
  "rating_context" TEXT /* Context or scenario in which the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being reviewed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review */,
  "review_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the review */,
  "review_details" TEXT /* More detailed explanation of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
